svg.title: Provincial poverty rate, annual ENEMDU 2025
svg.desc: Static provincial map of Ecuador colored by analytical income-poverty rate.
svg.text: Annual ENEMDU 2025, analytical estimates based on public microdata
Galápagos is repositioned for cartographic presentation. The geometry is used for display, not for distance or area measurement.
Source: author calculations based on public ENEMDU annual 2025 microdata.
